reasons: Floryn can heal Fanny even when Fanny dives far from the support's position.
Fanny benefits from global sustain after committing deep with cables or escaping after a burst attempt.

proof.summary: Floryn can heal Fanny across the map, supporting Fanny's high-mobility dive pattern without forcing Floryn into unsafe positioning.
worksBestWhen: Floryn tracks Fanny's dive timing and saves Bloom.
Fanny enters with enough energy and an escape path.
The team has vision around Fanny's target.
failureCases: Fanny is chain-controlled before the heal matters.
Floryn uses Bloom before Fanny commits.
Fanny dives too deep without vision.

reasons: Floryn can sustain Ling during split-map fights without needing to stand near him.
Ling benefits from healing after spending mobility tools to pressure isolated targets.

proof.summary: Floryn extends Ling's dive window by healing him globally while he pressures isolated targets or backline carries.
worksBestWhen: Ling commits after Floryn's ultimate is available.
The team has enough vision to avoid wasting Bloom on a losing dive.
Ling has an exit route after the target pressure.
failureCases: Ling is caught by hard crowd control.
Ling dives while Bloom is unavailable.
Enemy burst exceeds Floryn's sustain window.

reasons: Floryn's heal helps Joy stay alive while Joy moves through enemies and completes her rhythm-based damage window.
Joy often fights away from the backline, so global sustain fits her dive pattern.

proof.summary: Floryn supports Joy's repeated dash and ultimate window with global healing while Joy continues pressuring the enemy backline.
worksBestWhen: Joy has already entered a real fight and is taking return damage.
Floryn waits until Joy commits before using Bloom.
Joy has valid targets to continue her movement chain.
failureCases: Joy misses rhythm timing or cannot continue dashing.
Joy is burst before Bloom lands.
The enemy disengages after Floryn commits the ultimate.

reasons: Floryn helps Fredrinn stay alive while he absorbs damage and builds his combo pattern.
Fredrinn gives Floryn a durable frontline heal target whose value increases in extended fights.

proof.summary: Fredrinn gives Floryn a durable frontline heal target, while Floryn helps Fredrinn survive the damage intake needed for extended fights.
worksBestWhen: Fredrinn is tanking in front of his team.
Floryn times Bloom after Fredrinn commits and takes damage.
Fredrinn can continue hitting enemies after the heal.
failureCases: Fredrinn is kited and cannot convert pressure into damage.
Enemy anti-heal weakens the sustain value.
Floryn uses Bloom before Fredrinn's main fight window.

reasons: Floryn can support Alice during deep teamfight entries without following into danger.
Alice benefits from extra healing because her fight pattern depends on staying active after diving into enemy formation.

proof.summary: Floryn adds global sustain to Alice's extended fight pattern, helping Alice stay active after diving into the enemy formation.
worksBestWhen: Alice enters after enemy burst skills are partially used.
Floryn saves Bloom for Alice's committed dive.
Alice has team pressure around her dive.
failureCases: Alice is controlled before she can sustain.
Floryn's heal is reduced by anti-heal.
